devnotes.summary: Tortuosity factor for solute diffusion in soil empirical function of based on data of Barraclough (1993?)

function.name: Imax
function.devnotes:
function for calculation of maximum nitrate uptake rates of roots
parameters: Soil solution concentration [Kg N/cm3 H2O] Minimum soil solution concentration [Kg N/cm3 H2O] Volumetric water content [cm3/cm3] Water influx [cm3/cm*d] Mean root length density [cm/cm3] Mean root radius [cm] Maximum nitrate influx [Kg N/cm*d]
Nitrate Concentrations are in [Kg NO3-N/cm H2O] this unusual unit is the consequence of giving the amount of water in cm throughout the classes of this class library in order to convert to g N /l multiply by 1000 -> from kg to g multiply by 10000 x 10 from cm to l -> multiply by 1e8
